page_content:
Prerequisite: ENME351; or equivalent.

Jointly offered with: ENME473.

Credit Only Granted for. ENME473 or ENME690.

ENME691 Industrial Artificial Intelligence (3 Credits)

Introduces students to advanced technologies - such as machine learning and tools, prognostics and health management (PHM), and data- centric engineering analytics - that ultimately enable the conversion

of industrial big data into decision-ready information that can be used

to improve the design, the productivity and the efficiency of industrial systems.

Prerequisite: ENME202; or equivalent; experience using Python; or permission of the instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. ENME485 or ENME691.
